name: ItsaCheckmate Restaurant Order Aggregation API
what_it_does: ItsaCheckmate restaurant order aggregation middleware REST API for restaurant chains, ghost kitchens, and virtual brands to consolidate orders from DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub, and other delivery platforms into a single POS integration. Enables AI agents to manage multi-platform order ingestion and normalization for restaurant delivery channel consolidation automation, handle order routing to restaurant POS system for unified kitchen management automation, access menu management and publishing to multiple delivery platforms for restaurant menu consistency automation, retrieve aggregated order and sales data across delivery channels for restaurant multi-channel analytics automation, manage item availability and 86-management across all connected platforms for restaurant inventory automation, handle order error and injection failure alerting for restaurant operations automation, access virtual brand and ghost kitchen order management for delivery-only restaurant automation, retrieve platform-specific pricing and menu configuration for restaurant dynamic pricing automation, manage restaurant hours and order acceptance windows across platforms for availability management automation, and integrate ItsaCheckmate with NCR Aloha, Oracle Simphony, Toast, Square, and other POS for restaurant technology stack unification.
use_cases: Aggregating DoorDash/UberEats/Grubhub orders from ghost kitchen automation agents
Syncing menus across delivery platforms from restaurant management agents
Monitoring order injection failures from restaurant operations agents
Reporting multi-channel sales from restaurant analytics agents
not_for: Direct consumer-facing ordering (use ChowNow or Olo for owned channels)
Restaurant POS replacement (ItsaCheckmate integrates with existing POS)
Single-platform delivery integration (integrate delivery platform API directly)
best_when: A restaurant chain, ghost kitchen operator, or virtual brand wanting AI agents to automate multi-delivery-platform order aggregation, menu consistency management, and unified POS injection across DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub, and other delivery channels.
avoid_when: POS INTEGRATION COMPATIBILITY VERIFICATION: ItsaCheckmate integrates with major POS systems but coverage varies by POS version and configuration; automated order injection deployment for new restaurant locations must verify POS version compatibility before go-live; incompatible POS version creates order injection failure for all delivery platform orders at that location. DELIVERY PLATFORM CONTRACT COMPLIANCE FOR MENU CHANGES: Automated menu publishing to delivery platforms via ItsaCheckmate must comply with delivery platform partner terms; DoorDash and Uber Eats have menu change approval workflows; automated menu updates that violate delivery platform content policies create menu suppression by delivery platforms. GHOST KITCHEN BRAND ISOLATION FOR ORDER ROUTING: Ghost kitchen operations with multiple virtual brands at single physical kitchen must correctly route orders to brand-specific kitchen station; automated order routing without brand-to-station mapping creates cross-brand order fulfillment errors.

auth.notes: ItsaCheckmate uses API key and OAuth for restaurant and partner integrations. REST API with JSON. New York, New York HQ. Founded 2014 by Vishal Agarwal. Acquired by Lightspeed Commerce (NYSE: LSPD) in 2022. Restaurant order aggregation connecting DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub, Caviar, Postmates, Seamless to restaurant POS. Ghost kitchen and virtual brand management. POS integrations: NCR Aloha, Oracle Simphony, Toast, Square, Revel, Lightspeed Restaurant. Competes with Omnivore, Deliverect, and Ordermark (Otter) for restaurant order aggregation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-location monthly subscription for order aggregation
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly subscription; pricing based on number of connected delivery platforms and order volume; enterprise pricing for large chains
pricing.notes: New York NY. Lightspeed Commerce (NYSE: LSPD) subsidiary since 2022. Per-location subscription. Platform-count and volume-based pricing. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; order aggregation and menu queries throttled; webhooks for order and injection status events

known_agent_gotchas: ORDER INJECTION FAILURE SILENT LOSS RISK: ItsaCheckmate order injection failures (POS offline, version mismatch) may not generate immediate customer-visible failure on delivery platform; automated order injection monitoring must implement injection status polling or webhook for injection failure and trigger restaurant alert to handle order manually; silent injection failure creates missed order fulfillment

LIGHTSPEED ACQUISITION PLATFORM MIGRATION: ItsaCheckmate was acquired by Lightspeed in 2022; Lightspeed may integrate ItsaCheckmate capabilities into Lightspeed Restaurant platform; monitor Lightspeed integration roadmap for ItsaCheckmate platform consolidation that may affect standalone API availability for non-Lightspeed POS customers

DELIVERY PLATFORM MENU APPROVAL LATENCY: Automated menu updates published to DoorDash and Uber Eats via ItsaCheckmate are subject to delivery platform menu review; new items or significant price changes may require delivery platform approval with 24-72 hour delay; automated menu change deployment without platform approval timeline awareness creates temporary menu inconsistency on delivery platforms

86 ITEM PROPAGATION ACROSS ALL PLATFORMS: Automated item 86 (out-of-stock) via ItsaCheckmate propagates to all connected delivery platforms; propagation latency varies by delivery platform API update cycle (near-real-time for some platforms, up to 15 minutes for others); automated 86 management must account for propagation lag and implement temporary price inflation as customer deterrent until propagation completes

VIRTUAL BRAND ORDER VOLUME THRESHOLD FOR POS ROUTING: Ghost kitchen operations with high virtual brand order volume may exceed POS order queue capacity during peak periods; automated order routing for high-volume ghost kitchens must implement order pacing and queue depth monitoring; POS queue overflow creates delayed kitchen acknowledgment and order accuracy issues

DELIVERY PLATFORM CREDENTIAL MANAGEMENT PER LOCATION: ItsaCheckmate requires delivery platform credentials (DoorDash, Uber Eats, Grubhub) per restaurant location; automated multi-location onboarding must collect and provision platform credentials for each new location; credential management at scale for large chains requires secure vault and rotation strategy
agent_readiness.security_notes: Restaurant order aggregation. PCI-DSS. API key/OAuth. US/CA. Customer order data and delivery platform credentials.

security_score_components.security_notes: Order aggregation middleware. PCI-DSS. API key/OAuth. US/CA. Customer order and delivery platform credential data.
